cases.name: blog_canonical_route
cases.expected: source_module=blog and entity_type=blog_post derive /modules/blog?slug=... from a bounded safe projected slug

cases.name: blog_fail_closed
cases.expected: wrong source module, missing slug, non-string slug, traversal, spaces, and overlong slugs remain non-navigable

cases.name: product_and_content_compatibility
cases.expected: existing product and content routes remain available through the same owner policy

cases.name: content_kind_injection
cases.expected: unsafe source-module values cannot inject additional query parameters

cases.name: graphql_owner_projection
cases.expected: GraphQL Search result mapping delegates to the exported core policy instead of maintaining a transport-local URL switch

cases.name: storefront_native_owner_projection
cases.expected: native storefront Search result mapping delegates to the same exported core policy

cases.name: storefront_compatibility
cases.expected: the temporary storefront fallback preserves backend-provided URLs and only fills missing legacy payloads

runtime_promotion_requirements: execute rustok-search engine URL policy tests
execute GraphQL storefrontSearch against projected Blog documents
execute native storefront search and confirm the backend URL is present before compatibility enrichment
migrate the admin native result mapper to the shared policy
verify click analytics records the canonical href
remove compatibility fallback only after every Search consumer reads backend URLs
